name: Jeen
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion
factionTrait.text: A maelstrom moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Martial Discipline
uniqueTraits.text: After Jeen gains 1 or more wounds from an enemy skill, she may gain {protection_boon} or {dodge_boon}.

ultimate.name: Overrun
ultimate.text: Move Jeen up to 2 hexes. Then move each other friendly model within range up to 2 hexes in the order of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Blade Storm
plotSkills.text: This skill may target up to 3 models in 1 hex. After using Blade Storm, move Jeen up to 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Rapid Strike
plotSkills.text: Jeen may use this skill as a bonus action.

plotSkills.name: Polearm Sweep
plotSkills.text: Choose up to 2 hexes within range that are adjacent to each other. This skill can target 1 model in each of those hexes.

clashSkills.name: Polearm Sweep
clashSkills.text: Choose up to 2 hexes within range that are adjacent to each other. This skill can target 1 model in each of those hexes.

traits.name: Drive Back
traits.text: At the end of the Golden Shrikes' activation, choose a hex adjacent to a Golden Shrike. You may move each enemy follower in that hex up to 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Sprint
plotSkills.text: One Golden Shrike may move up to 3 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Slash and Dash
plotSkills.text: After using Slash and Dash, each Golden Shrike in this hex may move up to 1 hex.
